title: Mud and Terracotta
description: This Datapack offers two new recipes that can save time and minimize errors. the mud recipe is reliable but costs more, while the smelting recipe is useful for Super Smelters. Both are simple and convenient options to consider.
body:
This Datapack adds Two Simple Recipes for Quality of Life Purposes,

## The Mud Recipe

This Recipe involves 4 Dirt, 4 Water Bottles, or Any potion of your choice (Because I cannot add NBT Data in Crafting Recipes); this will output 3 Mud.

![Mud](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1058886920022802552/1101340620963983410/mudrecipe.png)

## The Terracotta Recipe

This Recipe allows Un-dyed Terracotta to pass through furnaces; I added this due to a problem on a server I regularly play on, where people have thrown Un-dyed Terracotta into a Super Smelter, which causes the Super Smelter to Clog and break. It might be happening to your fellow players as well!

![Terracotta](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1058886920022802552/1101341264487653446/image.png)
